backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Blood Connect app, defining user profiles, blood groups, emergency requests, and SOS image storage with role-based access control for admin/user operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the SOS button was removed from the home page UI, referencing the affected file and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose of each component, page, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file with OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Blood Connect React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all app routes (home, register, search, eligibility, dashboard, admin) and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal for newly authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AdminEmergencyRe: Admin table component that displays all emergency requests in reverse-chronological order with blood group, requester name, city, and formatted timestamp.
frontend/src/components/AdminSosImageUpl: Admin UI component for uploading a JPG/JPEG SOS banner image with aspect-ratio validation (4:3), upload progress tracking, and preview display.
frontend/src/components/AdminUserTable.t: Renders a paginated table of all registered users for the admin panel, with active/inactive status indicators and a (currently non-functional) deactivate button that warns about missing principal IDs from the backend.
frontend/src/components/DashboardStats.t: Displays two stat cards showing total registered donors count and a static 'Lives Saved' metric.
Renders a card for a single donor search result, showing blood group, name, city, last-active time, and call/WhatsApp contact buttons.
Form component with blood group selector and city input that triggers a donor search callback on submission.
frontend/src/components/EligibilityQuest: Multi-step questionnaire (age, weight, last donation date, health conditions) that evaluates and displays blood donation eligibility using a utility checker.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header, bottom navigation bar with five routes, and a main content outlet for child pages.
frontend/src/components/NearbyDonorsList: Displays a list of DonorResultCard components for donors found in a given city, with an empty-state message if none exist.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects new user profile details (name, role, blood group, phone, city, age) and submits them via the registerUser mutation on first login.
frontend/src/components/RecentRequestsLi: Renders a list of recent emergency blood requests, showing blood group, requester name, city, and time ago for each entry, or an empty state message if none exist.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationForm: A form component for registering a new user as a donor or receiver, collecting name, blood group, phone, city, age, and last donation date, with validation and a success state.
frontend/src/components/SOSButton.tsx: A pulsing SOS button that triggers an emergency blood request for the logged-in user's blood group and city, with a confirmation dialog and success feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, registration, donor search, emergency requests, and dashboard/admin data fetching and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a medical red/white color palette via CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus utility classes like sos-pulse animation.
frontend/src/lib/bloodGroup.ts: Provides display labels and option arrays for all blood group enum values, plus utility functions to format blood groups and compute relative time/availability from bigint timestamps.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that fetches and displays user and emergency request tables with stats, SOS image upload, and user deactivation functionality.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing stats, nearby donors, and recent requests for authenticated users, with loading skeletons and redirects for unauthenticated or unregistered users.
frontend/src/pages/DonorSearchPage.tsx: Donor search page with a search form for blood group and city, displaying matching donor result cards or empty-state messaging while handling loading states.
frontend/src/pages/EligibilityPage.tsx: Static page wrapping the EligibilityQuestionnaire component with a header and brief instructional info box.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a personalized welcome banner with login/logout, a registration CTA for guests, and quick-action links to search, eligibility, and dashboard pages.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page wrapping the RegistrationForm component with a back button and a brief explanation of registration benefits.
frontend/src/utils/eligibilityChecker.ts: Pure utility module that evaluates blood donation eligibility based on age, weight, health conditions, and last donation date, returning a result with reason and next eligible date.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via oklch CSS variables, typography, border radius, shadows, keyframes) and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking an active fix request (AR-1) to remove or hide an incorrectly displaying SOS button from the home page, with one existing feature entry and no architectural notes.
